title: eupatorium sordidum var. atrorubens
intro: Eupatorium sordidum var. atrorubens, also known as Black Eupatorium or Dark Joe Pye Weed, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eupatorium sordidum var. atrorubens include alleviating symptoms of colds, flu, and sore throats, as well as acting as a natural remedy for arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
